name: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited
summary: GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited, a healthcare company, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical medicines and vaccines in India and internationally. The company offers prescription and non-prescription drugs for asthma, infectious diseases, mental health, and digestive conditions, as well as anti-infective, gastrointestinal, nutrition, dermatology, immuno-inflammation, and respiratory diseases. It also provides vaccines for the treatment of cancer, as well as prevention of hepatitis A, hepatitis B, invasive disease caused by influenza, chickenpox, diphtheria, pertussis, tetanus, rotavirus, cervical cancer, invasive pneumococcal, and others; and consumer healthcare products. The company was formerly known as SmithKline Beecham Pharmaceuticals India Ltd. and changed its name to GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited in 2001. GlaxoSmithKline Pharmaceuticals Limited was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
